action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a wardrobe, a pillow, a book, a bed and a potion recipe. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the floor. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a couch, a chair, a table, a shelf and a side table. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a garden now. There are a nightshade, a lily of the valley, a garden bench and a bucket of water. The nightshade is on the floor. The lily of the valley is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the nightshade. In your inventory you have a nightshade.
action.label: context

action.content: > pick up lily of the valley
action.label: response

action.content: You take the lily of the valley. In your inventory you have a lily of the valley and a nightshade.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't go to a conservatory from here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a storage room now. There are a spoon, a plonkle crystal, a borpulus, a crate, a plinkle crystal, a whisk, a ladle and a plunkle crystal. The spoon is on the floor. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. The whisk is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. There are passages to a cellar and a hallway here.
action.label: context
